## TL;DR
Stepping back: is the original problem statement well-formed?
[stance: add]

## Argument
We're solving for token rotation cadence, but the actual incident that triggered this
work was an operational gap (no on-call rotation). Three layers of auth complexity to
fix a process gap may be misdiagnosis. What's the cheapest experiment that would
disprove "this is actually a process problem"?
